backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Classifieds page, ad library, grid layout, submission form) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the retro-themed magazine app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'The Daddy TGM' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with six routes (Home, Reader, Archive, Soapbox, About, Classifieds) wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/ClassifiedAdCard: Renders a single classified ad card with aged-paper styling, typewriter-style body font, and special badging for user-submitted ads including username and timestamp.
Renders all classified ads grouped by category in a responsive multi-column grid with ornamental category headers, diagonal stripe accents, and user ads displayed before static ads within each section.
frontend/src/components/ClassifiedSubmis: Form component allowing users to submit their own classified ads with category dropdown, headline (60-char max), body (200-char max), and optional contact fields, persisting via classifiedsUtils.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main page layout wrapper including Masthead, Navigation, a main content area, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Masthead.tsx: Renders the decorative magazine masthead header with the 'The Daddy TGM' title, retro stripe accents, and tagline.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Renders a responsive navigation bar with links to main site sections, supporting both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/PageRenderer.tsx: Renders individual magazine issue pages by dispatching to specialized components (MoviePosterPage, ComicStripPage, etc.) based on the page content type.
frontend/src/data/classifiedsLibrary.ts: Contains a static library of humorous retro-style classified ads across categories like For Sale, Personals, Help Wanted, and others for use in the magazine's Classifieds section.
frontend/src/data/contentLibrary.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data arrays for all magazine content types including spoof movie posters, comic strips, fake product ads, reviews, letters to the editor, and back-page items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor and invalidating dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a 1970s retro earth-tone design system with custom CSS variables, Tailwind base/components/utilities, and utility classes for retro typography, athletic headings, and newsprint textures.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static page displaying the fictional backstory and staff bios of 'The Daddy TGM' satirical magazine, styled with retro typography and card components.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivePage.tsx: Displays a list of archived magazine issues stored locally, saving the current date's issue on mount and allowing navigation to individual issues via the reader route.
frontend/src/pages/ClassifiedsPage.tsx: Renders a classifieds/want-ads page combining a static library of ads with user-submitted ads, including a submission form and a grid display component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the magazine's home/cover page, displaying today's issue number, date, cover content, and teasers for the next four pages with type labels and snippet previews.
frontend/src/pages/ReaderPage.tsx: Implements the paginated magazine reader, generating 50 pages from a seed, rendering the active page via PageRenderer, and providing prev/next navigation with URL-synced page state.
frontend/src/pages/SoapboxPage.tsx: Community bulletin-board page where users can submit posts, like them, and reply, with all data persisted to localStorage via soapboxUtils.
frontend/src/utils/classifiedsUtils.ts: Provides CRUD helpers for user-submitted classified ads stored in localStorage, including submit, load, and clear operations with auto-generated fake usernames.
frontend/src/utils/issueGenerator.ts: Generates a deterministic 50-page issue from a numeric seed by shuffling the content library pool and appending a back-page item as the final page.
frontend/src/utils/issueUtils.ts: Provides date-based issue number and seed calculations, archive persistence to localStorage, and date formatting/parsing helpers.
frontend/src/utils/prng.ts: Implements a seeded pseudo-random number generator using the mulberry32 algorithm, exposing random, shuffle, pick, pickN, and pickIndex utilities.
frontend/src/utils/soapboxUtils.ts: Manages soapbox post and reply data in localStorage, including add, like, and reply operations, plus a pool of 70s-themed fake usernames and a relative timestamp formatter.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (1970s retro palette, early 2000s athletic accents), custom font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing 'The Daddy TGM' retro magazine app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and version metadata for build planning purposes.
